title: 🚀 v2.0.0: Gif Search — Search and download GIFs from Tenor with caching, bulk downl...
content:
Search and download GIFs from Tenor with caching, bulk download, and format conversion

🆕 v2.0.0 features:
• Advanced CLI with 8+ subcommands
• JSON output for automation
• Built-in self-tests (CI-ready)
• Zero dependencies (Python stdlib)
• Cross-platform (Windows/macOS/Linux)

Free + MIT. Live on ClawHub: https://clawhub.ai/skills/skills/gif-search
GitHub: https://github.com/itsPremkumar/gif-search
